right side of binary expression '-' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type 'int' or 'real': Port types 'Types::speed.speed_impl' are not compatible with arithmetic operations in AGREE -> Introduce a real-valued variable to represent the difference between Target and Actual
left and right sides of binary expression '*' are of type 'real' and '<error>' but must be of the same type: Expression uses undefined or incorrectly typed variables -> Ensure all variables in the guarantee are properly defined with correct types
named thing must be an expression with a type: Invalid reference to undefined or incorrectly typed variables -> Define all variables with correct types before use
